text.tspan: Fertility rate vs. share living in extreme poverty, 2023

The
total fertility rate
, in a given year. Extreme poverty is defined as living below the
International Poverty Line
Data source: UN, World Population Prospects (2024); World Bank Poverty and Inequality Platform (2025)

Note: Poverty data is expressed in
international-$
at 2021 prices to account for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

Depending on the country and year, it relates to income (measured after taxes and benefits) or to consumption,
per capita
.
